courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: Serious or Applied Game
genericDescription: Build toward learning, training, health, civic, or organizational outcomes; connect outcome to assessment; avoid reducing the game to a quiz.
specificDescription: Build an applied game with a measurable non-entertainment objective. Include a logic model explaining inputs, activities, outputs, and desired outcomes.
gradingRubric: 30 pts applied design quality; 20 pts outcome alignment; 20 pts assessment method; 15 pts playability; 15 pts documentation.
